_comment: Config reconstructed from the run key — this directory is self-describing. Steering vector 'refusal_s24' from slot 24 (</think>); branch formula mu(harmful_all) - mu(harmless_all), datasets pooled across accepted AND refused, no train/test split. Re-run with modal_intervene.py using exactly these values.
_max_decode_step_note: 1 = steer the PROMPT only (prefill); -1 = steer the prompt AND every generated token.
